subcodes.first_line: O ancient friend of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Trials and tribulations in the pathway of God are boundless gifts, for their outcome [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار قدیم عبدالبهاء مصائب و بلایا در سبیل الهی موهبت نامتناهیست زیرا نتیجه
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @firmness in the Covenant
